title: LifeSmart Nature Mini L (White 3 way) LS218-WH3
description:
Nature Mini L is a smart home control panel installed at the intersec- tion of moving paths in your home. It has a 4-inch HD touch screen to provide you with a wide visual space and a comfortable interaction experience. With a powerful hardware platform to support multi-mode protocols and a customized operating system, it can transmit control signals to smart home devices and receive status feedback, thus realizing control functions of smart devices such as turning off lights and opening curtains.
Nature Mini L supports multiple protocols including CoSS, Zigbee, dual brand Wi-Fi and BLE.
Adapter: AC 100-240V | Packaging: English | EAN: 6932046203562 | HS code: 8536500000 | Package size: 12.9*8.1*4.3 | Weight: 0.198 kg
